L1.name: Research → Product Spec
findings: L1.1 research.md present and readable
L1.2 product-spec/product-spec.md present and readable
L1.3 Key research recommendations (async video v1, live classes Phase 2) consistently reflected in product-spec, spec.md, and plan.md

L2.name: Product Spec → Spec
findings: L2.1 Personas aligned (P12 Jamie, P13 Reese, P1 Casey, P2 Taylor, P9 Drew) in both artifacts
L2.2 Must Have story set (US-001..US-005) present in spec.md; FR-001..FR-010 in product-spec.md
L2.3 No missing Must Have requirements in spec.md vs product-spec (10/10 accounted for)
caveats: spec.md expresses Must Have as user stories; product-spec uses FR IDs. Explicit crosswalk not present.

L3.name: Spec → Plan
findings: L3.1 All 5 Must Have user stories from spec.md (US-001..US-005) are decomposed into plan.md acceptance criteria and task chains
L3.2 plan.md references M7 milestone and governance rules (GR-002, GR-007, GR-012, GR-014)
L3.3 Dependency contracts with 002/005/010/012 are explicitly mapped in plan.md §Dependencies

L4.name: Plan → Tasks
findings: L4.1 All 10 Must Have FRs and 5 Must Have USs have task coverage (verified T024-T052 decomposition)
L4.2 NO tasks are checked (0/85); no execution evidence exists
L4.3 CRITICAL: No implementation files found for planned workspaces (packages/api/cooking-school-*, packages/shared/cooking-school-*, packages/apps/sous-chef/{web,mobile} feature files)
L4.4 CRITICAL: This is a pre-implement state; task-to-code traceability cannot yet be closed

L6.name: Code → Verify
findings: L6.1 INFO: No implementation code exists (0 feature files in monorepo)
L6.2 INFO: verify-report.md exists but reports 5 CRITICAL, 5 WARNING, 7 PASSED, 3 SKIPPED
L6.3 INFO: v-model/release-audit-report.md blocked (102 scenarios untested); expected at pre-implement
L6.4 INFO: Missing-impl status is expected INFO per instruction

L7.name: Cross-Feature Dependency Evidence
findings: L7.1 CRITICAL: 002-user-auth dependency is Required in spec.md but no integration execution evidence exists
L7.2 CRITICAL: 010-subscriptions dependency (billing/payout/revenue-share) is referenced but no contract execution evidence exists
L7.3 CRITICAL: 012-creator-profile dependency (educator identity via CreatorProfile) is referenced but no integration execution evidence exists
L7.4 WARNING: 005-ai-integration dependency (AI script drafting) is referenced but no integration execution evidence exists
L7.5 WARNING: 001-sous-chef-recipe-app dependency (recipe-linked lessons) is referenced but no integration execution evidence exists
L7.6 No monorepo workspace refs found outside packages/apps/sous-chef/{web,mobile}; no apps/X flagged
